title: Forced F1
description: "Wait where did my HUD go?" - force-enables F1-mode
body:
Forces F1 mode. No more, no less.

A cursed mod meant to have you open your inventory over and over again every time you want to check your hotbar.

Why? Because I was enjoying the scenery of my gameplay at some point, and thought, actually, I could remember my usual hotbar layout, what if I made it so people had to do the same to play? So there it is. Enjoy!
